summary: Frontend build fix verification - icon migration from lucide-react to @phosphor-icons/react. Build passes, all pages load correctly, no visible text corruption on tested pages. Found and fixed 3 remaining text corruption issues.
feature_tested: Icon migration fix - verifying all frontend pages load and icons render correctly after fixing 1200+ TypeScript errors

landing_page.navigation_links: PASS - Login, Get Started buttons visible
landing_page.feature_cards: PASS - Visual Pipeline, Client Portal, Smart Analytics visible with icons
landing_page.text_corruption: PASS - No icon names appearing as visible text

login_page.form_elements: PASS - Email input, password input, submit button visible
login_page.button_text: PASS - Button says 'Sign in' (not icon name)

login_flow.login_success: PASS - test-user-a@test.com / password logs in successfully

dashboard.header_elements: PASS - Logo, user greeting, logout button visible
dashboard.settings_button: PASS - Settings gear icon visible and clickable
dashboard.add_lead_button: PASS - 'Add Lead' button visible with plus icon
dashboard.search_input: PASS - Search input visible with magnifying glass icon
dashboard.view_toggles: PASS - All 6 view toggles visible (Pipeline, List, Analytics, Calendar, Portfolio, Sequences)
dashboard.stat_cards: PASS - All 4 stat cards visible (Total Leads, New Leads, Quoted, Booked)
dashboard.icons_render: PASS - All phosphor icons render correctly (not broken/missing)
dashboard.text_corruption: PASS - No icon names appearing as visible text

mobile_view.bottom_nav: PASS - Mobile bottom nav visible with correct labels (Dashboard, Calendar, Portfolio, Settings)
mobile_view.bottom_nav_icons: PASS - All icons render correctly in bottom nav
mobile_view.mobile_sidebar: PASS - Opens correctly with hamburger menu
mobile_view.sidebar_labels: PASS - All labels correct (Pipeline, List View, Analytics, Calendar, Portfolio, Sequences, Settings, Feedback)
mobile_view.sidebar_icons: PASS - All icons render correctly in sidebar
mobile_view.text_corruption: PASS - No icon names appearing as visible text

errors: Failed to fetch revenue - network error in RevenueDashboard.tsx (not related to icon migration)

critical_code_review_comments: Text corruption fixes applied to 3 files where icon component names appeared as visible text instead of proper labels
All phosphor icon imports are correct with proper weight attributes
No TypeScript errors - build passes successfully
Minor console error about revenue fetch is unrelated to icon migration

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load, icons render, no text corruption

context_for_next_testing_agent: Icon migration from lucide-react to @phosphor-icons/react is complete. Build passes with 0 TypeScript errors. All main pages (Landing, Login, Dashboard) load correctly with icons rendering properly. 3 text corruption issues were found and fixed where icon component names appeared as visible text. Mobile view navigation also working correctly.
